title: IntEnz

infobox.value: (**Int**egrated relational **Enz**yme database) contains data on [enzymes](/wiki/Enzyme "Enzyme") organized by enzyme [EC number](/wiki/Enzyme_Commission_number "Enzyme Commission number") and is the official version of the Enzyme Nomenclature system developed by the [International Union of Biochemistry and Molecular Biology](/wiki/International_Union_of_Biochemistry_and_Molecular_Biology "International Union of Biochemistry and Molecular Biology").[[1]](#cite_note-pmid14681451-1)

Fleischmann A, Darsow M, Degtyarenko K, Fleischmann W, Boyce S, Axelsen KB, Bairoch A, Schomburg D, Tipton KF, Apweiler R (January 2004). ["IntEnz, the integrated relational enzyme database"](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC308853). *Nucleic Acids Res*. **32** (Database issue): D434–7. [doi](/wiki/Doi_(identifier) "Doi (identifier)"):[10.1093/nar/gkh119](https://doi.org/10.1093%2Fnar%2Fgkh119). [PMC](/wiki/PMC_(identifier) "PMC (identifier)") [308853](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC308853). [PMID](/wiki/PMID_(identifier) "PMID (identifier)") [14681451](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/14681451).

outgoing_links.text: International Union of Biochemistry and Molecular Biology
outgoing_links.target_title: International Union of Biochemistry and Molecular Biology

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Biological enzyme database

**IntEnz** (**Int**egrated relational **Enz**yme database) contains data on [enzymes](/wiki/Enzyme "Enzyme") organized by enzyme [EC number](/wiki/Enzyme_Commission_number "Enzyme Commission number") and is the official version of the Enzyme Nomenclature system developed by the [International Union of Biochemistry and Molecular Biology](/wiki/International_Union_of_Biochemistry_and_Molecular_Biology "International Union of Biochemistry and Molecular Biology").[[1]](#cite_note-pmid14681451-1)

["IntEnz, the integrated relational enzyme database"](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC308853). *Nucleic Acids Res*. **32** (Database issue): D434–7. [doi](/wiki/Doi_(identifier) "Doi (identifier)"):[10.1093/nar/gkh119](https://doi.org/10.1093%2Fnar%2Fgkh119). [PMC](/wiki/PMC_(identifier) "PMC (identifier)") [308853](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC308853). [PMID](/wiki/PMID_(identifier) "PMID (identifier)") [14681451](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/14681451).
